description: An optimized prompt for generating a detailed and realistic portrait of a beauty in Song Dynasty traditional Hanfu within an ancient courtyard.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成宋代汉服美人在古代庭院中的精细写实肖像画的优化提示词。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 生成宋代漢服美人在古代庭院中的精細寫實肖像畫的優化提示詞。
description_i18n.ja: 古代の中庭で宋朝の伝統的なHanfuを着た美人の詳細でリアルな肖像画を生成する最適化されたプロンプト。
description_i18n.ko: 고대 안뜰에서 송나라 전통 Hanfu를 입은 미인의 세밀하고 사실적인 초상화를 생성하는 최적화된 프롬프트.
description_i18n.de: Optimierter Prompt zur Generierung detaillierter, realistischer Porträts einer Schönheit in traditioneller Hanfu-Kleidung der Song-Dynastie in einem antiken Innenhof.
description_i18n.fr: Prompt optimisé pour générer un portrait détaillé et réaliste d'une beauté en Hanfu traditionnel de la dynastie Song dans une cour ancienne.
description_i18n.ru: Оптимизированный промпт для создания детального и реалистичного портрета красавицы в традиционном Hanfu династии Сун в древнем дворике.
description_i18n.es: Prompt optimizado para generar un retrato detallado y realista de una belleza con Hanfu tradicional de la dinastía Song en un patio antiguo.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Prompt otimizado para gerar um retrato detalhado e realista de uma beldade em Hanfu tradicional da Dinastia Song em um pátio antigo.
description_i18n.it: Prompt ottimizzato per generare un ritratto dettagliato e realistico di una bellezza in Hanfu tradizionale della dinastia Song in un cortile antico.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt được tối ưu hóa để tạo chân dung chi tiết và chân thực của người đẹp mặc Hanfu truyền thống thời nhà Song trong sân cổ.
description_i18n.pl: Zoptymalizowany prompt do generowania szczegółowego i realistycznego portretu piękności w tradycyjnym Hanfu z dynastii Song w starożytnym dziedzińcu.
description_i18n.id: Prompt yang dioptimalkan untuk menghasilkan potret detail dan realistis dari kecantikan dalam Hanfu tradisional Dinasti Song di halaman kuno.
description_i18n.nl: Geoptimaliseerde prompt voor het genereren van een gedetailleerd en realistisch portret van een schoonheid in traditionele Hanfu van de Song-dynastie in een oude binnenplaats.
description_i18n.ar: موجه محسّن لإنشاء صورة شخصية مفصلة وواقعية لجمال يرتدي Hanfu التقليدي من أسرة Song في فناء قديم.
description_i18n.tr: Antik bir avluda Song Hanedanı geleneksel Hanfu'su içinde bir güzelin detaylı ve gerçekçi portresini oluşturmak için optimize edilmiş prompt.
description_i18n.uk: Оптимізований промпт для створення детального та реалістичного портрета красуні в традиційному Hanfu династії Сун у стародавньому дворику.
description_i18n.en: An optimized prompt for generating a detailed and realistic portrait of a beauty in Song Dynasty traditional Hanfu within an ancient courtyard.

query.en: An {argument name="character description" default="18-year-old Chinese Internet celebrity beauty"}, with a model figure, exquisite facial features, cold and sweet temperament, wearing {argument name="outfit" default="elegant light pink Song Dynasty Hanfu"}, exquisite clothing details, with ancient-style buns, exquisite hairpin headdresses and embroidered shoes. The whole body stands in the front, with a natural and elegant posture, slightly showing the curve of the body. The {argument name="setting" default="scene is a beautiful ancient-style courtyard, with flowers and trees, cloisters and soft light and shadow"}. The picture is a high-quality ultra-realistic photography style, the characters are clear, the skin is delicate, the whole is aesthetic and high-end, and the 9:16 vertical composition.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：An {argument name="character description" default="18-year-old Chinese Internet celebrity beauty"}, with a model figure, exquisite facial features, cold and sweet temperament, wearing {argument name="outfit" default="elegant light pink Song Dynasty Hanfu"}, exquisite clothing details, with ancient-style buns, exquisite hairpin headdresses and embroidered shoes. The whole body stands in the front, with a natural and elegant posture, slightly showing the curve of the body. The {argument name="setting" default="scene is a beautiful ancient-style courtyard, with flowers and trees, cloisters and soft light and shadow"}. The picture is a high-quality ultra-realistic photography style, the characters are clear, the skin is delicate, the whole is aesthetic and high-end, and the 9:16 vertical composition.
